mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_material ( title, user_id, document_type, source, status, parser, document_summary, chunk_count, original_filename, original_file_path, storage_type, object_key, public_url ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{userId}, #{documentType}, #{source}, #{status}, #{parser}, #{documentSummary}, #{chunkCount}, #{originalFilename}, #{originalFilePath}, #{storageType}, #{objectKey}, #{publicUrl} )
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_material SET status = #{status}, parser = #{parser}, document_summary = #{documentSummary}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE learning_material SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, user_id, document_type, source, status, parser, document_summary, chunk_count, original_filename, original_file_path, storage_type, object_key, public_url, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_material WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, title, user_id, document_type, source, status, parser, document_summary, chunk_count, original_filename, original_file_path, storage_type, object_key, public_url, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_material WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
